title: rubus × neoburgensis
intro: Rubus × neoburgensis, a hybrid blackberry plant, is a cross between the Japanese blackberry (Rubus ellipticus) and the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × neoburgensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × neoburgensis, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide potential health benefits.
